chatManagement.deleteSelectedConfirmContent: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected chats?

errors.noActiveChat: No active chat selected to export.

group.autoModeHint: Automatically generate responses every X seconds. Set to 0 to disable.

Example:
[{'{{user}}'} is a 28-year-old Romanian cat girl.]

rename.prompt: Enter the new name for this persona:

errors.importFailed: Failed to import personas. Please check the file format.

worldInfo.activeWorldsHint: These lorebooks will be active in all chats.
worldInfo.minActivationsHint: Minimum number of entries to activate (if possible) regardless of scan depth
worldInfo.minActivationsDepthMaxHint: Maximum scan depth to search for minimum activations
worldInfo.maxRecursionStepsHint: Maximum number of recursion loops to prevent infinite loops
worldInfo.includeNamesHint: Include names with each message into the context for scanning
worldInfo.recursiveScanHint: Entries can activate other entries by mentioning their keywords
worldInfo.caseSensitiveHint: Lookup for the entry keys in the context will respect the case
worldInfo.matchWholeWordsHint: If the entry key consists of only one word, it would not be matched as part of other words
worldInfo.useGroupScoringHint: Only the entries with the most number of key matches will be selected for Inclusion Group filtering
worldInfo.alertOnOverflowHint: Alert if your world info is greater than the allocated budget.

entry.contentPlaceholder: What this keyword should mean to the AI...
entry.positionTooltip:
{'↑'}Char: Before Character Definitions
{'↓'}Char: After Character Definitions
{'↑'}EM: Before Example Messages
{'↓'}EM: After Example Messages
{'↑'}AN: Before Author's Note
{'↓'}AN: After Author's Note
{'@'}D ⚙️: at Depth (System)
{'@'}D 👤: at Depth (User)
{'@'}D 🤖: at Depth (Assistant)

popup.newBookContent: Enter the name for the new lorebook:

popup.deleteEntryContent: Are you sure you want to delete the entry "{name}"?
popup.importEmbeddedContent: This character has an embedded lorebook named "{name}". Do you want to import it into your World Info library?

errors.loadListFailed: Failed to load lorebooks. Make sure you are on the staging branch on SillyTavern.

backgrounds.autoSelectTooltip: Automatically select a background based on the chat context
backgrounds.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete {fileName}?

errors.noChatLock: Select a chat to lock the background for it.

aiConfig.manualInputNote: Click slider numbers to input manually.

presets.deletePopupContent: Are you sure you want to delete the preset "{name}"?

errors.importInvalid: Failed to import preset. The file might be invalid.
errors.invalidFieldTypes: Invalid preset: field types are incorrect.

promptManager.label: Prompt Manager
promptManager.description: Control how the final prompt is constructed before being sent to the AI.
promptManager.markerHint: This is a marker prompt. It serves as a placeholder for injected content and cannot be edited directly.

contextSize.label: Context Size (tokens)
contextSize.unlockedTooltip: Only enable this if your model supports context sizes greater than the slider's default maximum.

streaming.label: Streaming
streaming.description: Display the response bit by bit as it is generated. When this is off, responses will be displayed all at once when they are complete.

showThoughts.label: Request model reasoning
showThoughts.description: Allows the model to return its thinking process. This setting affects visibility only.

reasoningEffort.label: Reasoning Effort
reasoningEffort.tooltip:
Constrains effort on reasoning for reasoning models.
Reducing reasoning effort can result in faster responses and fewer tokens used on reasoning in a response.
reasoningEffort.descriptionOpenAI: OpenAI-style options: low, medium, high. Minimum and maximum are aliased to low and high. Auto does not send an effort level.
reasoningEffort.descriptionClaude: Allocates a portion of the response length for thinking (min: 1024 tokens, low: 10%, medium: 25%, high: 50%, max: 95%), but minimum 1024 tokens. Auto does not request thinking.
reasoningEffort.descriptionGoogle: Allocates a portion of the response length for thinking (Flash 2.5/Pro 2.5) (min: 0/128 tokens, low: 10%, medium: 25%, high: 50%, max: 24576/32768 tokens). Auto lets the model decide.

useSysPrompt.label: Use System Prompt
useSysPrompt.description: If enabled, the first system-role message will be used as Claude's system prompt.

assistantPrefill.label: Assistant Prefill
assistantPrefill.description: Text to pre-fill the assistant's response with. Usually `{'{{char}}'}:`

useSysPrompt.label: Use System Prompt
useSysPrompt.description: If enabled, the system prompt will be formatted in a way that is more compatible with Google models.

send.label: Send Media
send.description: Sends media in prompts if supported by the model.

limits.google: For Google models: Videos must be less than 20 MB and under 1 minute long. Audio must be less than 20 MB.

enable.label: Enable Tools
enable.description: Allow the model to use registered tools/functions.

warning.postProcessing: Tool calling is disabled because the selected Custom Prompt Post-Processing mode does not support it.

status.noConnection: No connection... If you are sure that the connection details are correct, try sending a test message to verify the connection.

errors.csrfToken: Couldn't get CSRF token. Make sure SillyTavern is running in the background. Then refresh the page.

generate.noPrompts: No prompts were built for the AI. Please check your prompt settings.
generate.errorFallback: Failed to get a response from the AI.
generate.noModelError: No model selected. Please check your API connection settings.
generate.noPersonaError: No persona selected. Please check your persona settings.
generate.noSpeaker: No valid speaker found for generation.
generate.postProcessError: Post-processing failed. Check console for details.
generate.emptyResponseError: The AI returned an empty response.
generate.toolError: Tool execution failed. Check console for details.

delete.confirmSwipeMessageWithToolChain: Are you sure you want to delete this swipe? Note: Deleting the message will also delete {count} related tool step(s).
delete.confirmBulkContent: Are you sure you want to delete {count} messages?

selection.modeRange: Selection Mode: To Bottom (Click to select from message to end)

itemization.title: Prompt Itemization
itemization.disclaimer: Only the white numbers really matter. All numbers are estimates. Grey color items may not have been included in the context due to certain prompt format settings.

media.videoTooLong: Video '{name}' is too long. It must be under 1 minute.

media.unsupportedVideo: The current model does not support video uploads.
media.unsupportedAudio: The current model does not support audio uploads.

disabled.setting: Tools are disabled in sampler settings.
disabled.postProcessing: Tools are incompatible with the current Prompt Post-Processing setting.
disabled.model: The active model does not support tool calling.

import.errorMessage: The file is likely invalid or corrupted.

fetch.overflowWarning: Character data length limit reached. To resolve this, set "performance.lazyLoadCharacters" to "true" in config.yaml and restart the server.

delete.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?

character.tokenWarning: Character definition is large ({tokens} tokens), using over {percentage}% of your context window. This may impact performance and context limits.

bulkTags.description: You are editing tags for {count} selected characters. Changes will be applied to all of them.

characterEditor.detailsHidden: Character details are hidden. Click the above eye icon or disable "Spoiler Free Mode" in settings.

characterEditor.firstMessagePlaceholder: This will be the first message from the character that starts every chat.
characterEditor.openLastChat: Open last chat with this character
characterEditor.startNewChat: Start a new chat with this character

tokenCounts.title: Token counts may be inaccurate and provided just for reference.

characterEditor.name: Name

placeholder.text: Select an extension from the list on the left to view its details and settings.

profileManagement.create: Save current connection as new profile
profileManagement.deletePopupContent: Are you sure you want to delete the profile "{name}"?
profileManagement.noChanges: No changes detected based on current settings.
profileManagement.staleSamplerRemoved: Sampler preset "{sampler}" was not found, so profile "{profile}" now uses the current sampler.

errors.nameExists: A profile with this name already exists.

apiConnections.keyPrivacy: For privacy reasons, your API key will be hidden after you click 'Connect'.

instruct.title: Instruct Template
instruct.deleteContent: Are you sure you want to delete {name}?

reasoning.title: Reasoning Templates
reasoning.deleteContent: Are you sure you want to delete the reasoning template "{name}"?

postProcessing.label: Prompt Post-Processing
postProcessing.description: Applies additional processing to the prompt before sending it to the API.
postProcessing.tooltip: Applies additional processing to the prompt before sending it to the API.

prompts.strict_tools: Strict (user first, alternating roles; with tools)
prompts.strict: Strict (user first, alternating roles; no tools)

customProxy.title: Proxy Settings
customProxy.deleteProfileContent: Are you sure you want to delete the proxy profile "{name}"?

apiConnections.pendingSecretsNote: You have unsaved API keys. Press 'Test Message' to save and validate them.

spoilerFreeMode.label: Spoiler Free Mode
spoilerFreeMode.description: Hide character definitions from the editor panel behind a spoiler button.

neverResizeAvatars.label: Never resize avatars
neverResizeAvatars.description: Avoid cropping and resizing imported character images. Disables the upload cropping popup.

sendOnEnter.label: Enter to Send
sendOnEnter.description: Determines if the Enter key sends a message.

worldImportDialog.label: Lorebook Import Dialog
worldImportDialog.description: Ask to import World Info for new characters. If unchecked, a brief message will be shown instead.

confirmMessageDelete.label: Confirm Message Deletion
confirmMessageDelete.description: Show a confirmation dialog before deleting a chat message.

tagImportSetting.label: Tag Import Behavior (popup not implemented)
tagImportSetting.description: How to handle tags when importing characters.

hideEmbeddedTagsInPanel.label: Hide embedded tags
hideEmbeddedTagsInPanel.description: If enabled, tags saved directly inside character cards (embedded) will not be displayed in the character browser or editor. Only custom tags will be visible.

hideEmbeddedTagsInSuggestions.label: Hide embedded tags in suggestions
hideEmbeddedTagsInSuggestions.description: If enabled, tags from character cards will not appear in the auto-complete suggestions for tag fields.

disableAnimations.label: Disable all animations
disableAnimations.description: Disables CSS transitions, Vue transitions, and other animations for better performance and accessibility

forceMobileMode.label: Force Mobile Mode
forceMobileMode.description: Always use the mobile layout, even on larger screens.

reasoningCollapsed.label: Collapse Reasoning by Default
reasoningCollapsed.description: If enabled, the reasoning (thinking) block on messages will be collapsed by default.

forbidExternalMedia.label: Forbid External Media
forbidExternalMedia.description: Prevent loading of external media in chat messages.

messagesToLoad.label: Messages to Load
messagesToLoad.description: Number of messages to load when loading more messages in chat.

codeMirrorExpanded.label: Expanded CodeMirror Editor
codeMirrorExpanded.description: Use the expanded CodeMirror editor for better markdown support.

codeMirrorIdentifiers.label: CodeMirror Fields
codeMirrorIdentifiers.description: Select which fields should use the CodeMirror editor.

stopOnNameHijack.label: Stop on name hijack
stopOnNameHijack.description: Stop generation if the AI tries to speak for another character or user. It is a {'{{name}}'}: check.

regenerateOnEdit.label: Auto-regenerate on Edit
regenerateOnEdit.description: Automatically regenerate the AI's response when a user message is edited. This does not apply to the first message of the chat.

mergeToolMessages.label: Merge Tool Messages
mergeToolMessages.description: [EXPERIMENTAL] Combine consecutive tool messages in the chat view. This is a display-only feature and does not affect prompt construction or generation.

chatBranching.name: Chat Branching
chatBranching.description: Adds an option to branch the chat from a specific message.

chatMemory.name: Chat Memory
chatMemory.description: Summarize long conversations into World Info entries, or generate concise summaries for individual messages to optimize context.

chatTranslation.name: Chat Translation
chatTranslation.description: Translate chat messages using an LLM connection profile.

generationTools.name: Generation Tools
generationTools.description: Adds Reroll continue, Delete continue, Swipe, Impersonate, and special Generate buttons.

groupChat.name: Group Chat
groupChat.description: Enables group chat functionality with multiple characters.

liveCommentary.name: Live Commentary
liveCommentary.description: Shows characters' thoughts as you type in the chat.

modelRandomizer.name: Model Randomizer
modelRandomizer.description: Randomize model and sampler settings for each generation to create varied responses.

mythicAgents.name: Mythic Agents (GME)
mythicAgents.description: Full Mythic GME 2e oracle, scenes, and UNE NPCs.

notebook.name: Notebook
notebook.description: A rich text editor for taking notes.

phone.name: Phone
phone.description: Adds message-scoped SMS conversations for roleplay chats.

rewrite.name: Magic Rewrite
rewrite.description: Rewrite and enhance text in input, chat, and other fields using LLM.

roadway.name: Roadway
roadway.description: Provides AI-generated choices for user replies, creating a CYOA experience.

standardTools.name: Standard Tools
standardTools.description: A collection of essential tools for LLMs, including Web Search and URL Inspection.

textToSpeech.name: Text to Speech
textToSpeech.description: Read chat messages aloud with system voices, OpenAI, ElevenLabs, Kokoro-FastAPI, or local OpenAI-compatible TTS.

timeline.name: Timeline
timeline.description: Tracks scheduled RP reminders and recurring events.

usageTracker.name: Usage Tracker
usageTracker.description: Tracks LLM token usage and statistics across the application and other extensions.

worldMap.name: World Map
worldMap.description: Creates and updates a structured chat map.

promptPresets.createContent: Enter a name for the new prompt preset:
promptPresets.renameContent: Enter a new name for this prompt preset:
promptPresets.duplicateName: A prompt preset with that name already exists.

textToSpeech.autoPlayAssistantHint: Read completed assistant messages aloud after generation finishes.
textToSpeech.streamingPlaybackHint: Start playback as audio arrives when the selected provider supports it. Kokoro-FastAPI and OpenAI-compatible streaming use PCM.
textToSpeech.streamingStartMinWordsHint: Start auto-play during streamed generation after this many cleaned words are available.
textToSpeech.apiKeyHint: Only use this for local or trusted endpoints. Cloud provider keys should stay server-side.
textToSpeech.voiceHint: Character-specific voices below override this default voice.
textToSpeech.kokoroVoicesHint: One voice id per line. Used when the server does not expose a voices endpoint.
textToSpeech.characterVoicesHint: Optional one mapping per line, for example: Alice=af_bella
textToSpeech.testPhrase: This is a NeoTavern text to speech test.

chatTranslation.connectionProfileHint: Select the API connection profile to use for generating translations.
chatTranslation.promptHint: Customize how the LLM translates text. Supports Handlebars variables: {'{{prompt}}'}, {'{{sourceLang}}'}, {'{{targetLang}}'}, {'{{name}}'}.
chatTranslation.buttonInjectionFailed: Translation button injection failed: message element not found.
chatTranslation.noConnectionProfile: No connection profile selected for translation
chatTranslation.autoSourceReverseWarning: Cannot reverse translate when Source Language is "Auto". Please set a specific Source Language.

generationTools.generateNoInput: Please enter some text in the chat input to use Generate .
generationTools.rerollDisabled: Reroll continue is disabled in settings.
generationTools.deleteContinueDisabled: Delete continue is disabled in settings.
generationTools.contextChanged: Chat history has changed since the  last 'Continue'. Cannot reroll.
generationTools.divergenceError: Current message content has diverged from the snapshot
generationTools.swipeDisabled: Swipe is disabled in the settings.
generationTools.swipeNotApplicable: Swipe is not applicable for this message.

settings.promptDesc: Optional text to prepend to the message prompt.
settings.generatePromptDesc: Optional text to prepend to the Generate & Swipe prompt

settings.name: Name
settings.ignoreInputHint: If enabled, this template doesn't use {'{{input}}'} and the UI will hide input-related controls
settings.sessionPreambleHint: The system prompt used for the chat session context.
settings.resetTemplatesContent: This restores the built-in Magic Rewrite templates from the latest app defaults. Your custom templates will be kept.
settings.deleteAllSessionsContent: This permanently deletes every saved Magic Rewrite session. Templates and settings will not be changed.

popup.escapeMacrosHint: Prevents {'{{macros}}'} in input text from being processed
popup.contextCharactersDesc: Select additional characters to include in the context.
popup.contextLorebooksDesc: Select additional lorebooks to include in the context.

session.noSessions: No active sessions. Create a new one to start.
session.selectSession: Select or create a session to start.
session.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this message? This will also delete all subsequent messages in this session.

settings.defaultConnectionProfileDesc: Used for LLM Decision mode and AI Summary generation.
settings.defaultTemplatesDesc: These templates are used as defaults for new group chats. You can customize them per-chat in the Group tab.
settings.llmDecisionPromptDesc: Template for AI to decide who speaks next in LLM Decision mode.
settings.aiSummaryPromptDesc: Template for generating character summaries used in Swap+Summaries mode.
settings.summaryInjectionTemplateDesc: Template for the complete description with summaries. Controls where and how summaries appear. Note: This modifies the character description during generation in Swap+Summaries mode.

warnings.missingSummaries: Warning: {count} character{plural} missing {summaryPlural} in Swap+Summaries mode

chatMemory.overlapWarning: Warning: Selected range overlaps with an existing memory.

errors.startGreaterThanEnd: Start cannot be greater than End
errors.endLessThanStart: End cannot be less than Start
errors.noSummariesToClear: No summaries to clear in range

tooltips.noMemoriesToReset: No memories to reset for this chat
tooltips.resummarizeRange: Re-summarize all messages in range, including existing ones

reset.title: Reset Memory
reset.content: This will remove all auto-generated memory entries for this chat and unhide the original messages. Are you sure?

summarizeRange.title: Summarize Messages
summarizeRange.contentAll: This will re-summarize {count} messages in the selected range, overwriting existing summaries. Continue?
summarizeRange.contentMissing: This will summarize {count} unsummarized messages in the selected range. Continue?

clearRange.title: Clear Summaries
clearRange.content: This will delete summaries for {count} messages in the selected range. Are you sure?

deleteAll.title: Delete All Summaries
deleteAll.content: This will delete all per-message summaries in the entire chat. Are you sure?

settings.title: Settings
settings.autoDesc: Automatically generate summaries for new messages as they arrive.
settings.promptDesc: Prompt used to summarize a single message.
settings.ignoreCountDesc: The number of most recent messages where the summary should be ignored in favor of the full original text during prompt generation.

notebook.title: Notebook
notebook.deleteNoteContent: Are you sure you want to delete this note?
notebook.welcomeContent:
Welcome to your Notebook!

You can start taking notes here.
notebook.emptyState: Select a note to start editing, or create a new one.

phone.title: Phone
phone.connectionProfileHint: Overrides the chat connection profile for phone generations.
phone.recentChatMessagesHint: Use -1 to include the full current chat context.
phone.recentSmsMessagesHint: Used inside explicit SMS reply prompts.

toasts.refreshAlreadyRunning: Phone contact refresh is already running.
toasts.smsAlreadyRunning: SMS generation is already running for this contact.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.connectionProfileHint: Overrides the chat connection profile for extraction.
timeline.recentMessagesHint: Use -1 to include the full current chat context.
timeline.dueInjectedHint: Maximum due events injected into prompt context. Use -1 for all.
timeline.upcomingInjectedHint: Maximum upcoming events injected into prompt context. Use -1 for all.

toasts.invalidTime: Use YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss for timeline time.
toasts.schemaRepair: Timeline response needs schema repair. Retry {count}/{max}...

worldMap.title: World Map
worldMap.autoUpdateHint: Optional AI updates after new chat messages. Manual create/update remains available from message buttons and chat actions.
worldMap.connectionProfileHint: Overrides the chat connection profile for map generation.
worldMap.recentMessagesHint: Use -1 to include all messages up to the selected message.
worldMap.includeActiveLorebooksOnCreateHint: When no map exists yet, include every enabled entry from active lorebooks in the map creation request.
worldMap.sendWholeLorebookEntriesHint: Include all enabled entries from active lorebooks in this map request.

worldMap.removeWorldMapContent: Remove the existing world map for this chat?

toasts.removed: World map data removed for this chat.

toasts.rebuilt: World map rebuilt without this message delta.

mythicAgents.title: Mythic Agents
mythicAgents.autoAnalyzeHint: Automatically analyze user messages for implied questions and roll fate when Mythic is active.
mythicAgents.autoUpdateSceneHint: Automatically update the scene state after each narration.
mythicAgents.connectionProfileHint: The connection profile to use for LLM analysis and event generation.
mythicAgents.defaultChaosRankHint: The default chaos rank for new scenes (1-9).
mythicAgents.requestFormatHint: Format to enforce for Mythic structured responses.

popups.deletePreset: Are you sure you want to delete preset "{name}"?

toasts.builtInCannotDelete: Built-in Mythic Agents presets cannot be deleted

panel.noSceneData: No scene data available. Start a new scene to begin.
panel.name: Name
panel.noOpenThreads: No open threads. Add one to track plot points.

standardTools.corsProxyHint: Required to bypass browser security when fetching external websites.
standardTools.maxResultsHint: Maximum number of search results to return.
standardTools.maxContentLengthHint: Character limit for the extracted content to prevent context overflow.
standardTools.useFandomApiHint: Prefer Fandom's MediaWiki API for Fandom wiki pages, then fall back to normal URL inspection if it fails.

roadway.autoGenerateChoicesHint: Automatically generate choices after every AI response when Roadway is active in a chat.
roadway.choiceConnectionProfileHint: Overrides the chat's connection profile for generating choices.
roadway.numberOfChoicesHint: How many choices to generate for each message.
roadway.requestFormatHint: Format to enforce for the structured response.
roadway.choicePromptHint: The prompt sent to the AI to generate choices. Use {'{{choiceCount}}'} to reference the number of choices.
roadway.impersonateConnectionProfileHint: Overrides the chat's connection profile for the Impersonate action.
roadway.impersonatePromptHint: The prompt sent to the AI to expand a choice into a full user response.
roadway.generateChoicesTitle: Generate reply choices for the last AI message

toasts.noAiMessage: No AI message found to generate choices for.
toasts.noChoiceProfile: Roadway: Choice Generation Connection Profile is not set.
toasts.noImpersonateProfile: Roadway: Impersonate Connection Profile is not set.
toasts.parseFailed: Roadway: Failed to parse choice generation response.
toasts.noStructuredContent: Roadway: No structured content in choice generation response.

usageTracker.clearAllUsageDataContent: Are you sure you want to clear all usage logs? This action cannot be undone.
usageTracker.notEnoughData: Not enough data to display graph for this period.

settings.keepFullPayloadsHint: Stores full LLM payloads and responses locally for inspection. This can include private chat content.
settings.captureStorageLimitHint: Maximum local storage for captured request/response records.

liveCommentary.connectionProfileHint: The LLM profile used to generate character thoughts.
liveCommentary.promptHint: The prompt template for generating thoughts. Uses Handlebars syntax with variables.
liveCommentary.askActionTitle: Ask AI about the current chat history
liveCommentary.askPromptHint: The prompt template for answering questions about chat history. Includes question and chatHistory variables.
liveCommentary.askAlreadyRunning: An Ask request is already running.
liveCommentary.askNeedsQuestion: Type a question in the chat input first.
liveCommentary.askNeedsChat: Open a chat before asking about chat history.
liveCommentary.askNeedsCharacter: Add an active character before asking.
liveCommentary.experimentalNote: This is an experimental extension created to test new concepts. Its future is uncertain, and it may be changed or removed. Feedback is welcome!
liveCommentary.maxWaitMsHint: Triggers commentary if typing this long without pausing.
liveCommentary.enableInjectionHint: Injects the generated thoughts into the prompt for the AI response.
liveCommentary.injectionDepthHint: Number of recent thoughts to inject.
liveCommentary.injectionTemplateHint: Template for the injected thought. Variables: {'{{char}}'}, {'{{thought}}'}
liveCommentary.commentaryHistoryHint: Max number of recent commentaries to include in the prompt context.
liveCommentary.noConnectionProfile: Live Commentary: No connection profile selected.

status.success: Tracker data extracted successfully. Click to run again.

popups.deletePresetContent: Are you sure you want to delete the preset '{name}'? This cannot be undone.
popups.selectSchemaContent: Select the schemas you want to use for tracking in this chat.
popups.resetAllContent: This will reset all schema presets to their default values. This action cannot be undone.
popups.resetSchemaContent: Are you sure you want to reset the schema for "{name}" to its default value?
popups.resetTemplateContent: Are you sure you want to reset the HTML template for "{name}" to its default value?
popups.resetPromptContent: Are you sure you want to reset the prompt template for "{name}" to its default value?

toasts.alreadyInProgress: Tracker generation is already in progress for this message.
toasts.presetExistsError: A preset with that name already exists.
toasts.cannotDeleteLastPreset: You cannot delete the last preset.
toasts.noSchemasConfigured: No tracker schemas are configured for this chat. Please manage schemas first.

settings.connectionProfileHint: Overrides the chat's connection profile for tracker generation.
settings.autoModeHint: Automatically run tracker on new messages.
settings.promptEngineeringHint: Method to ensure structured output. Native is best if the model supports it.
settings.deltaModeHint: Ask for partial JSON updates after the first full tracker when the schema allows it.
settings.jsonSchemaHint: Defines the structure of the data to extract.
settings.htmlTemplateHint: Handlebars template to render the extracted data in the chat.
settings.promptTemplateHint: The prompt sent to the AI for data extraction.
settings.maxResponseTokensHint: Max tokens for the tracker's response.
